title: tuberaria vulgaris f. alpestris
intro: Tuberaria vulgaris f. alpestris, also known as Alpine Rockrose, is a subform of the Tuberaria species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alpine Rockrose include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Alpine Rockrose can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
